CVE-2019-17533.title: Mat_VarReadNextInfo4 in mat4.c in MATIO 1.5.17 omits a certain '\ ...
CVE-2019-17533.description: Mat_VarReadNextInfo4 in mat4.c in MATIO 1.5.17 omits a certain '\0' character, leading to a heap-based buffer over-read in strdup_vprintf when uninitialized memory is accessed.
